title: WB Artifact
description: Canonical governed artifact for external knowledge. The artifact is captured content plus provenance. Embeddings are derived indexes, not canonical objects.

artifact_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this artifact. Pattern: WB-XXXXX.

spec_version.description: Version of the artifact schema this object conforms to.

content_hash.description: Hex-encoded digest of the canonical content. Used for integrity verification.

content_hash_algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used to produce content_hash.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the source was captured.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last modification to this artifact record.

source.description: Provenance metadata about the original source material.

author.description: Author or creator of the source material.

retrieved_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the source was retrieved from its origin.

source_id.description: Optional external identifier (DOI, ISBN, archival ID, etc.).

language.description: BCP 47 language tag for the source content.

content.description: Canonical content representation. This is the authoritative text. All derived representations (embeddings, chunks, summaries) reference this content.

canonical_text.description: Extracted readable text. This is the authoritative content for integrity verification.

raw_format.description: Original format of the source before normalization.

chunks.description: Optional segmented representation for retrieval. Not required for artifact validity. Chunks are derived from canonical_text, not stored independently.

relationships.description: Links between this artifact and other entities. Relationships are advisory — they document connections without creating graph-level consistency guarantees.

derived_from.description: Artifact IDs this artifact was derived from (e.g., parent conversation, source document).

supersedes.description: Artifact IDs that this artifact replaces or supersedes.

superseded_by.description: Artifact IDs that have superseded this artifact.

related_to.description: Artifact IDs related to this artifact without a specific directional relationship.

referenced_in.description: Conversation IDs, session IDs, or work packet IDs where this artifact was referenced.

lifecycle.description: Current lifecycle state of this artifact. Managed independently within Working Bibliography per ADR-WB-005.

lifecycle_transitions.description: History of lifecycle state transitions for audit trail.

metadata.description: Extensible key-value metadata for custom annotations.

index_references.description: References to derived indexes. These are the extension's internal pointers — not canonical artifact data.

embedding_id.description: Identifier for the vector embedding entry derived from this artifact.

search_index_id.description: Identifier for the search index entry derived from this artifact.

receipts.description: References to evidence receipts generated for this artifact.

capture_receipt.description: Receipt ID for the capture event that created this artifact.

retrieval_receipts.description: Receipt IDs for retrieval events that referenced this artifact.

lifecycle_receipts.description: Receipt IDs for lifecycle transition events.

allOf.description: If chunks are present, canonical_text must have a word_count
